params.name: Chang'e and Laurel
params.description:
On Sept 30, 1509 AD, Tang Yin completed this painting — Chang'e and Laurel.
This painting, a masterpiece by Tang Yin, a renowned scholar of the Ming Dynasty, features Chang'e's captivating smile and her beautifully billowing skirt. The interplay of rounded and smooth lines with flowing squares greatly enhances the picture's beauty, showcasing Tang Yin's remarkable skill.
